mapper.select:
SELECT d.id, d.devicename AS name, d.datatablename, d.id_device_type, dt.name AS device_type_name, s.id AS id_site, s.name AS site_name, t.value AS timezone_value, JSON_ARRAYAGG(JSON_OBJECT( 'name', TRIM(dp.slug), 'unit', IFNULL(dp.unit, ""), 'aggregate_function', dp.value_chart_tool )) AS parameters FROM device d LEFT JOIN device_type dt ON dt.id = d.id_device_type LEFT JOIN site s ON d.id_site = s.id LEFT JOIN time_zone t ON t.id = s.id_time_zone LEFT JOIN device_group dg ON d.id_device_group = dg.id LEFT JOIN device_parameters dp ON dp.id_device_group = dg.id WHERE s.third_party_key = #{key} AND s.status = 1 AND s.is_delete = 0 AND d.status = 1 AND d.is_delete = 0 AND dp.status = 1 AND dp.is_delete = 0 AND dp.is_calculation = 0 AND dp.is_filter = 1
#{item}
AND d.id IN (${id_device})
AND (CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', t.value) < s.expiration OR s.expiration IS NULL) GROUP BY d.id

SELECT
${item.name},
time_group_by AS time FROM ( SELECT
IF (DATEDIFF(#{endDateTime}, #{startDateTime}) <= 5, AVG(dv.nvmActivePower), SUM(dv.MeasuredProduction))
${item.aggregate_function}(dv.${item.name})
AS ${item.name},
FROM_UNIXTIME((UNIX_TIMESTAMP(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', t.value)) DIV 900) * 900, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i')
DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', t.value), '%Y-%m-%d %H:00')
DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', t.value), '%Y-%m-%d')
DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', t.value), '%m/%Y')
DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', t.value), '%Y')
FROM_UNIXTIME((UNIX_TIMESTAMP(CONVERT_TZ(dv.time, 'UTC', t.value)) DIV 900) * 900, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i')
AS time_group_by FROM ${datatablename} dv LEFT JOIN device d ON d.id = dv.id_device LEFT JOIN site s ON s.id = d.id_site LEFT JOIN time_zone t ON t.id = s.id_time_zone
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT( CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ), '%Y-%m-%d') AS time_has_data, dv.id_device FROM ${datatablename} dv LEFT JOIN device d ON d.id = dv.id_device LEFT JOIN site s ON s.id = d.id_site LEFT JOIN time_zone t ON t.id = s.id_time_zone WHERE dv.id_device = #{id} AND (CAST(CONVERT_TZ( dv.time, 'UTC', t.value ) AS DATETIME) BETWEEN CAST(#{startDateTime} AS DATETIME) AND CAST(#{endDateTime} AS DATETIME)) ORDER BY dv.time ASC LIMIT 1 ) si ON si.id_device = dv.id_device
WHERE dv.time BETWEEN CONVERT_TZ(DATE_FORMAT(#{startDateTime}, '%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00'), t.value, 'UTC') AND CONVERT_TZ(DATE_FORMAT(#{endDateTime}, '%Y-%m-%d 23:59:59'), t.value, 'UTC') GROUP BY time_group_by ) t
